taskName: benchmark compare 阈值策略重构

summary.implemented: Refactored benchmark/compare.js to use relative baseline + tolerance strategy instead of fixed thresholds. Added calculateThreshold() with min(relative, absolute) logic.
summary.scopeGuard: Only P6 threshold strategy refactoring task implemented.

benchmark/compare.js: Added useRelative flag to toggle relative comparison
Implemented calculateThreshold() with min(relative, absolute) logic
Changed hotMaxMs from 500ms to 2000ms (absolute safety cap)
Updated output format to show threshold type and limit
